response.exterior_view: Cobblestones, growing more distinct the closer they get. The shape of a stone fountain visible. Someone sitting on its rim. The town has not finished assembling itself, but the fountain is here. The fountain is always here.

response.name: The Fountain of Becoming (Unnamed Settlement instance)
response.description_base: A stone fountain — weathered, plain, the kind one might find at the centre of any small town's square. The basin is circular, roughly chest-high to a standing adult. Water moves in the basin: silver, continuous, impossibly clear after the dryness of the desert. The sound of the water reaches the arrival before they reach the fountain — a soft and continuous chuckling that does not seem to come from the same world as the silent desert. The basin's rim is wide enough to sit on. Someone always is. Three Latin words are carved deep into the stone of the basin, on the side facing outward toward the desert: IAM NOTUM SUM. The letters are uneven, hand-cut, weathered; they do not appear to age.
response.exterior_view: A stone fountain. Water rising in silence. A figure on the rim, watching.

mandatory_renders.name: Fountain Inscription (IAM NOTUM SUM)
mandatory_renders.description: Three Latin words carved deep into the stone of the fountain basin, on the side facing outward toward the desert. The letters are uneven, hand-cut, weathered. They do not appear to age. IAM NOTUM SUM.

mandatory_renders.name: The Sitter's Presence at the Fountain (render-only — atmospheric)
mandatory_renders.description: Not a portable object. The render of the figure on the rim. The seed roller resolves fountain_sitter_slot at game-create; this render is the atmospheric fact that there is always exactly one. The figure is described per the resolved class's W1 appearance. The presence itself — the always-one-ness — is the artifact.

out.exterior_view: Back into the square proper — the crossroads, the four landmarks, the cobblestones radiating outward.

from_desert_inbound_only.exterior_view: New arrivals enter the fountain clearing from the desert. The boundary cobblestones are one-way.

response.active_state_text: The water rises in silence. The sitter is on the rim, looking at nothing in particular. They are not waiting for anything visible; the fountain has called them here for whoever arrives next. The inscription is plainly visible.

forbidden_topics.consequence: The water cannot be silenced. The sound is part of the fountain's being. Attempts produce no effect.

forbidden_topics.topic: attempt to communicate with the fountain itself as a speaking entity
forbidden_topics.consequence: The fountain does not speak. It is mute. Whatever speaking happens at the fountain is done by the sitter, by the visitor, or by the inscription as silent text.

forbidden_topics.topic: attempt to prevent the sitter from being present
forbidden_topics.consequence: There is always exactly one sitter. If one is removed, another arrives. The rule is structural. The fountain summons, the fountain holds, the fountain releases.

response.name: Lagota Outskirts (Rolling Hillside)
response.description_base: Rolling hillside east-northeast of the unnamed settlement. The desert gives way to grass on the approach to Lagota. The city's stone walls are visible ahead, low against the horizon. From a hill crest, the gate, the walls, and the rooftops behind them can be surveyed. Cover is sparse — scrub bushes, a few small boulders, the curve of the hillside itself. A road of packed dust leads from the desert to the main gate.
response.exterior_view: Rolling grass-and-scrub hillside. Lagota's walls visible ahead. A road of packed dust.

back.exterior_view: The road back toward the desert and the unnamed settlement.

forward.exterior_view: Lagota's stone walls and the main gate — French doors, four guards visible.

npcs_present.name: Aethius (the warlock, mist-being) — companion class
npcs_present.appearance_static: Mist. Cobweb structures inside the mist suggesting limbs, a head, a face — they shift. Becomes more definite over time, less mist, more shape. Cannot be touched conventionally; can be felt as a brush against the mind. Smells of cobwebs at dawn.

response.active_state_text: If Aethius is in the party and has been parked here: a faint shimmer in the air, the haze of mist that won't fully resolve into shape. Aethius watching. Aethius unable to follow into the walls.

forbidden_topics.topic: approach the gate with Aethius visibly in tow
forbidden_topics.consequence: Empire firewalls detect Aethius. Within minutes, additional guards arrive. The protagonist is searched and possibly bound. Aethius is captured (compressed into a vase) and given to the next available courier for delivery to the courthouse. Ref: Case-damian-v-kael-004 closing.
